title: Jude Hill — Websites, made simple.
description: Freelance designer and developer building fast, modern websites for small businesses and creatives in Eugene, Oregon.

blocks.title: Websites, made simple.
blocks.subtitle: Fast, beautiful sites built by hand for small businesses, creatives, and anyone with an idea worth shipping.

blocks.heading: Selected work
blocks.body: A few projects I have designed and shipped for real businesses.

items.title: Rosales Designs
items.body: Branding studio website focused on clarity, motion, and conversion.

items.title: Bobby Salazar's
items.body: Restaurant and retail web presence with streamlined navigation and strong performance.

items.title: Gravel Truck Plans
items.body: Simple, calm informational site for families preparing important planning documents.

blocks.heading: How I work
blocks.body: A fast, collaborative process that keeps momentum high from kickoff to launch.

items.title: Clean and simple
items.body: No clutter, no bloat. Every section has a job and supports the goal.

items.title: Continuous support
items.body: After launch, I keep iterating based on feedback and real usage.

items.title: Quick and fast
items.body: Performance comes first so pages load smoothly on real devices.

blocks.heading: A little about me
blocks.body: I am a high school student from Eugene, Oregon who builds websites for small businesses and creatives. I design in the browser, ship every few days, and hand off something you can update yourself.
